members.name: GetEnabledComponents
members.summary: Returns the components enabled by this configuration. [b]Note:[/b] Only valid after this configuration was used to create a spatial context.

members.name: ArucoDict
members.summary: Dictionary to use to decode Aruco markers. [b]Note:[/b] Must be set before using this configuration to create a spatial context.
